title: picea pinsapo var. glauca
intro: Picea pinsapo var. glauca, also known as the Spanish blue spruce, is a rare and endemic coniferous plant species found in the Iberian Peninsula, specifically in the mountainous regions of Spain and Portugal. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which contains compounds such as alpha-pinene and beta-pinene, that have anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Picea pinsapo var. glauca include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as an infusion, decoction, or essential oil for topical application, and is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
